titleStmt.title: SII 26.472: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 472. (A.R. No. 449 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌAIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a grant of 20 mā of land in Viḷankaḷappaṟṟu in Śrīvallavaṉ-maṅgalam and 1/2 mā of land for flower-garden and grove, one oilmill, twenty looms and puñjai lands, flora and fauna, all these probably in Ambalattāḍinallūr alias Maṇappaḍaivīḍu in the northern part of Śrīvallavaṉ maṅgalam, a Brahmadēśam in Kīḻkaḷak-kūṟṟam, to the temple of the god Mūṉṟīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of the place. It is stated that the gift was intended to provide for food-offerings, flowers, clothes, and nandā lamp which formed part of daily routine services to the god, and for worship on such special occasions as vishu. ayana and eclipses, on days when the star Bharaṇi fell as well as for worship with doubled provisions on days when the natal star of the king fell.
A certain Māttāṇḍāṉ Śīvindiramuḍaiyāṉ and a sculptor (name lost) figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Aruḷicceyal kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu brahmadeśam śrīvallavaṉmaṅkalattu vaṭakkup piṭākai Ampalattāṭinallūr
Āṉa maṇappaṭaiviṭṭil Uṭaiyār muṉṟiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟ koyilil tevakaṉmikaḷukku Iṉ
ṉāyiṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi tirupparivaṭṭam tirumāvali tirunantāviḷakkuṭpaṭṭa nittiya nimantaṅkaḷu
kku tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa nilam Āvatu śrīvillavaṉmaṅkalattu viḷaṅkaḷappaṟṟil citevi vāykkālukku
vaṭakkum muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu kiḻakku niṉṟum taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Oru mā Araikkāṇikkum kālukkum meṟku taṭi
Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ meṟku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam kāṇikkiḻaraiyum Itaṉ I
ṭai taṭi palanilam muṉṟu māmukkāṇi Uṭaiyār parāntevaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku meṟku taṭi muṉ
ṟu nilam kāṇi muntirikaiyum nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟu meṟku niṉṟum taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇikku kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu ni
lam mukkāṇiyum Itaṉ kiḻakku taṭi muṉṟu nilam Oru mā Araikkāṇiyum Itaṉ Iṭai taṭi palanilam muṉṟu mā A
araikkāṇi muntirikaikku kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇiyum Aiñcāṅ kaṇṇāṟu kiḻakku niṉṟum taṭi pala nilam
Oru māvarai muntirikaikkum kāṇikkum meṟku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyum Itaṉ meṟku taṭi Iraṇ
ṭu nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉiṭai taṭi palanilam Iraṇṭu mākkāṇikku meṟku taṭi
Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟu meṟku niṉṟum taṭi nālu nilam Oru mā mukkāṇikku kiḻa
kku taṭi nālu nilam Oru mā muntirikaiyum Itaṉ kiḻakku taṭi nālu nilam Oru mā Araikkāṇi muntirikai
yum Itaṉiṭai taṭi pala nilam nālu māvaraiye Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraikku kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟu
nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Ēḻāṅkaṇṇāṟu kiḻakku niṉṟum taṭi pala nilam muṉṟu māvaraiye
Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraikku meṟkutaṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Oru māmuntirikaiyum Itaṉ meṟku taṭi Ira
ṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyum Eṭṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟu meṟku niṉṟum taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Arai māvaraikkāṇikku
kkiḻakkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ kiḻakkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Oru māvum Itaṉ kiḻakku
t taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi munti
rikaikkum kālukkum kiḻakkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyum kiḻakkuttaṭi muṉṟu nilam Araimāvaraikkāṇi munti
rikaiyum Itaṉ kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyum Oṉpatāṅ kaṇṇāṟu kiḻakku niṉṟum taṭi mūṉṟu nilam Oru mā
varaikkāṇi muntirikaikku vaṭamēṟkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiyum Itaṉ vaṭak
kut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiyum Itaṉ meṟkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam
Oru mā muntirikaik kiḻaraiyum Itaṉ meṟkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ meṟku
ttaṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaiyum pattāṅ kaṇṇāṟu kiḻakku niṉṟum taṭi muṉṟu nilam kāṇi mun
tirikaiyum Itaṉ meṟkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiyil cāttaṉ viḷaṅkuḷamuṭaiyār Aiya
pātti nikki nilam muntirikaik kiḻaraiyum Itaṉ vaṭameṟku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Araimā muntirikai kiḻa
raiyil Uṭaiyār parānteśvaramuṭaiya nāyiṉār tevatāṉam nikki nilam Araik kāṇi muntirikai
kiḻ Araiyum Ākattaṭi Aṉpattu Añciṉāl nilam Irupatumā Iṉṉilam Irupatu māvum Iṉṉāyiṉāṟkut ti
runaṉtāvaṉamum toppum Uṭpaṭṭavakaikku Ellai Āvatu kiḻ Ellai kaṇṭaṉ kāl piṟkaraiyil kuruttukku
meṟkut teṉ Ellai kaṇṭaṉ kālukku vaṭakku mel Ellai nāyiṉār kāṇaiṉiyaperumāḷ koyilukkuk ki
ḻakkil teṉmaṭalāṉa nārācattukku kiḻakku vaṭavellai taṉporuntap perāṟṟukkut teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ
ku Ellai Uṭpaṭṭa talattil tirumaṭaviḷākam niṅkalāka Uḷḷa nilattil koṭiiṭṭukkoḷḷum nilam Arai
māvum cekku Oṉṟum taṟi Irupatum puṉceyum māvaṭai māvaṭaiyumkūṭa Aṟunūṟṟu Oru pattu Ayyāmāṇṭu pacā
ṉa mutalukku Orupattu Āṟām Āṇṭu taimātam patinālāntiyati tanta Aḷavukku tāṅkaḷum Ittaravu piṭipāṭākak
kaiyyāṇṭu koṇṭu Iṉṉilam Irupatumāvil kaṭamaiyum Ūrmāvicainta cilavarip peruvariyum mā
vaṭai maravaṭaiyilum cekkiṟai taṟikkaṭamai koṭittoṭṭam puṉcai Uṭpaṭṭa vakaiyilum mutalām mutal
koṇṭu Iṉṉāyiṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi tirupparivaṭṭam tirumālai tirunaṉtāviḷakku Uṭpaṭṭa nittiya nimanta
ṅkaḷukkum viṣu Ayana haṅkiṟama Uṭpaṭṭa pala viśeṣadivaṅkaḷil pūjaikkum bharaṇikkum Āṭṭai piṟanta nā
ḷil paṭi Iraṭṭi pūjaikkum Uṭpaṭa Iṭṭap paṭittarattiṉ paṭiye cantirādittyayavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempi
lum veṭṭikkoṇṭu pūjaiyum tāmu naṭattikkoṇṭu potavum pāṟkka Ivai māttāṇṭāṉ
civintaramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu IppaṭikkuThis part of the line seems to have been wantonly erased. Ācāri Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.472 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
